title: The Rules of Writing Scientific Articles
author: Turkan Ismailli
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The article deals with the rules and processes of writing scientific articles. The article explains how to choose titles, how to write a detailed summary, what to emphasize in the introduction and the main part. At the same time, discussion and method preparation, references and conclusion section, which are required in high-index journals, are mentioned. In addition, the ethical rules of writing articles are also touched upon.
